INFANTRY.name: Infantry Corps
INFANTRY.description: General-purpose ground forces, strong in occupation and defensive holding.

ARMOR.name: Heavy Armor Division
ARMOR.description: Strong in assault and breakthroughs, weak to anti-armor.

ANTI_ARMOR.name: Anti-Armor Battalions
ANTI_ARMOR.description: Counters armor, weaker in aggressive open assault.

AIRBORNE.name: Airborne Regiments
AIRBORNE.description: Bypasses some fortification effects, strong in maneuver.

ARTILLERY.name: Artillery Batteries
ARTILLERY.description: Increases siege and morale damage, weak in close engagement.

SPECIAL_OPS.name: Special Operations Group
SPECIAL_OPS.description: Targets supply, command, and occupation resistance.

MILITIA.name: Local Militia
MILITIA.description: Weak combat stats but useful for defense and resistance.
